prose: **Water HOMO–LUMO gap**: DFT at tier 'standard' (functional: B3LYP, basis set: def2-TZVP) using the PySCF engine, in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The geometry was sourced from the given XYZ file and used as-is without further optimization. SCF converged after 7 cycles. HOMO = -8.60372 eV, LUMO = 0.33695 eV, yielding a Koopmans-style frontier-orbital gap of approximately 8.94067 eV. Total electronic energy: -2080.6615 eV (electronic energy only).
